response.justification: Sarah has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership experience across diverse stacks and domains, but lacks documented German proficiency (only 'Basic' listed), has no explicit evidence of architectural design, UML, or team management at executive level, and her resume lacks clear project leadership or client advisory roles required for this Head of Development position.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across multiple languages and environments (DLang, Node, TypeScript, Linux)
Demonstrated mentorship and workshop leadership in testing, TDD, and web internals
concerns: German language proficiency listed as 'Basic' — fails C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of IT architecture design, UML modeling, or client advisory experience
Resume emphasizes individual contributor roles over team leadership or project oversight
